title: The Lantern in the Dark
description: A solo coastal mystery where you race to relight a dead lighthouse before another ship is lost.
campaign_theme:
The lighthouse above the cove has gone dark, and every tide now feels like a warning. Fishing boats are staying close to shore, villagers are trading ghost stories, and another wreck could come with the next storm.

You return home just as fear turns into action. To save the village, you will have to follow uneasy clues through docks, cliffs, and sea-caves, then confront whatever is taking advantage of the darkness.

Mira Vale is built for a grounded one-hero adventure, protecting a threatened community with grit, steel, and the kind of local knowledge that turns survival into an edge.
preview_hook: The lighthouse above Blacksalt Cove has gone dark, and the village is already whispering about wreckers and ghosts.
preview_character_summary: A seaborne Guardian Stalwart who knows every reef path around the village and refuses to let smugglers claim another life.

premade_character.name: Mira Vale
premade_character.summary: A seaborne Guardian Stalwart who knows every reef path around the village and refuses to let smugglers claim another life.
premade_character.description: Salt-stiff cloak, steady eyes, and a lantern-hook shield scarred by old storms.
premade_character.background: Former harbor watch sentry who stayed when the rest of the crew scattered after a deadly shipwreck.
premade_character.connections: The villagers trust you to keep them safe, but one of the smugglers may be someone you once protected.

title: Whispers of the Thornwood
description: A solo wilderness survival adventure where you track a spreading blight through the Thornwood and fight to restore its heart.
campaign_theme:
The Thornwood once kept the whole region in balance, but now streams blacken, animals flee, and an unnatural sickness is pushing outward from the forest's heart.

You are called in before the corruption reaches nearby settlements. The deeper you go, the stranger the woods become, forcing you to survive hostile terrain, read the forest's warnings, and decide what can still be saved.

Ash Thorn is built for a careful solo expedition, using sharp senses, mobility, and hard-earned fieldcraft to stay ahead of a threat that is changing the land itself.
preview_hook: Animals are fleeing the Thornwood, streams are turning black, and the old forest paths now whisper your name.
preview_character_summary: A wildborne Ranger Wayfinder who reads the forest like a map and is determined to cut the corruption out at its source.

premade_character.name: Ash Thorn
premade_character.summary: A wildborne Ranger Wayfinder who reads the forest like a map and is determined to cut the corruption out at its source.
premade_character.description: Moss-green leathers, a bow polished with cedar oil, and charms braided from old antlers.
premade_character.background: Trail guide and boundary warden for a settlement that survives because you know which paths stay alive.
premade_character.connections: The forest spirits still answer you, but something wearing a familiar voice is trying to lure you deeper.

title: The Merchant's Gambit
description: A solo intrigue adventure where you unravel a relic heist at a crowded trade fair before the deal is done.
campaign_theme:
The Grand Exchange is loud, glittering, and full of promises, but one bad deal could ruin the entire fair before sunset. Traders, performers, and guild officials are all chasing advantage while a priceless relic prepares to change hands.

As rumors harden into a real threat, you move through auction halls, taverns, and merchant politics to expose a scheme hiding behind polished manners and forged reputations.

Lucan Reed is built for a social puzzle-box campaign, leaning on charm, fast reads, and improvisation to stay one step ahead of the con.
preview_hook: A priceless relic will change hands by sunset unless you can expose the fraud, sway the crowd, and survive the chaos you stir up.
preview_character_summary: A loreborne Bard Wordsmith whose charm opens doors, but whose sharp eye for lies is the real weapon at the trade fair.

premade_character.name: Lucan Reed
premade_character.summary: A loreborne Bard Wordsmith whose charm opens doors, but whose sharp eye for lies is the real weapon at the trade fair.
premade_character.description: Fine coat, quick smile, and a satchel packed with notes on every guildmaster worth flattering.
premade_character.background: Traveling negotiator who learned that every market has a song, and every liar misses a beat.
premade_character.connections: One of the fair's patrons thinks you are here to help them win the auction, while another knows too much about your past cons.
